name: captain-data
description: Reads Captain Data workspace, workflows, jobs, and job results, and writes a launch_workflow action to trigger a new workflow run, through the Captain Data v3 REST API.

risk.read: external Captain Data API read of workspace, workflow, and job data
risk.write: external mutation; launches a live Captain Data workflow run, consuming account credits and potentially performing external side effects depending on the workflow's own configured steps; approval required
